items.official_heima: Llama-3.2-Vision-11B VLM
items.rationale: Small local GPT-2 is an explicit resource substitute, but removes vision capacity.

items.official_heima: Uses image marker and image transform
items.rationale: Resource-driven simplification; nevertheless changes Heima data semantics.

items.official_heima: LLaVA/vision CoT with SUMMARY/CAPTION/REASONING sections
items.rationale: Synthetic data made G1 cheap, but not Heima domain.

items.official_heima: Requires SUMMARY/CAPTION/REASONING extraction
items.rationale: Heima latent taxonomy depends on these sections.

items.current_g1: No replacement; z inserted as hidden vector
items.official_heima: Replaces section spans with typed thinking tokens
items.rationale: Official main loss learns explicit thinking-token placeholders.

items.current_g1: Single latent vector; EOS placeholder only in B prompt
items.official_heima: Three typed tokens
items.rationale: Typed latent channels are core to Heima overlap.

items.official_heima: Multiple compression orders and stages
items.rationale: Official pipeline trains/evaluates staged compression behavior.

items.official_heima: Three local decoder datasets
items.rationale: Current B reconstructs a whole CoT, not local Heima sections.

items.official_heima: Decoder templates include original question
items.rationale: Not in allowed intended differences; it strongly affects overlap audit.

items.official_heima: Local tagged section
items.rationale: This is the most direct explanation for weak shuffled-normal separation.

items.official_heima: Assistant answer from torchtune labels after shift
items.rationale: Both are CE next-token losses, but token regions/schema differ.

items.official_heima: Multimodal user tokens are masked by torchtune
items.rationale: Both avoid direct question-token CE in the audited path.

items.official_heima: Compressed assistant contains typed thinking tokens
items.rationale: Current A never learns to emit Heima latent tokens.

items.official_heima: Hidden states at shifted typed thinking-token positions
items.rationale: Current z is ordinary question-token hidden, not special thinking-token hidden.

items.official_heima: Per-stage repeated token counts, three channels
items.rationale: Capacity and indexing differ.

items.official_heima: Decoder has abstract_projection for latent tokens
items.rationale: Official decoder path includes trainable projection.

items.official_heima: Three decoders summary/caption/reasoning
items.rationale: Current setup cannot measure per-stage Heima overlap.

items.official_heima: VLM decoder with LoRA and abstract projection
items.rationale: Model simplification is resource-based but behavior differs.

items.current_g1: replace EOS placeholder embedding with z
items.official_heima: thinking_token + thinking_token_mask arguments
items.rationale: Both inject hidden state, but via different model interface.

items.current_g1: Loss1 uses z without detach and returns to A
items.official_heima: Decoder losses share current_loss.backward through main hidden states
items.rationale: Allowed intended method: Loss1 through B returns to A.

items.official_heima: Main plus active decoder losses in one backward tensor
items.rationale: Allowed intended method: joint optimization.

items.official_heima: No detach observed on thinking_token path
items.rationale: Allowed intended method: Loss1 does not detach latent.

items.official_heima: Separate main and decoder optimizers
items.rationale: Both update main/decoder surfaces, but optimizer topology differs.

items.official_heima: LoRA adapter params; freeze in stage 2_5
items.rationale: Full small-model finetune is practical but not LoRA baseline.

items.official_heima: LoRA + abstract_projection
items.rationale: Resource simplification; removes projector-specific training.

items.official_heima: FSDP-enabled torchtune recipe
items.rationale: System adaptation expected for lightweight audit.

items.current_g1: Default GPT-2 fp32 unless torch default changes
items.official_heima: bf16/FSDP style large-model recipe
items.rationale: Resource adaptation.

items.official_heima: Tokenizer has explicit <THINKING_OF_*> special IDs
items.rationale: EOS placeholder is not a Heima thinking token.

items.official_heima: Per-stage decode scripts and metrics
items.rationale: Current eval does not answer Heima local decoder quality.

items.official_heima: Main adapter plus decoder adapters/projectors
items.rationale: Checkpoint format changed by lightweight implementation.

items.official_heima: Drops samples missing required sections or duplicate token counts
items.rationale: Official data validity constraints absent.

items.current_g1: Same records feed main and whole-CoT B
items.official_heima: Main, summary, caption, reasoning dataloaders stepped together
items.rationale: Aligned at sample level, not at Heima stage level.

items.official_heima: Labels hstack shifted then CEWithChunkedOutputLoss
items.rationale: Both implement next-token CE with ignore index.

items.official_heima: Multimodal user prompt likely masked; assistant local section supervised
items.rationale: Masking similar, target content differs critically.

items.item: B can bypass latent using question
items.official_heima: Official B sees question plus latent token
items.rationale: This current anti-bypass choice is not in the allowed intended-difference list.

items.official_heima: Typed local decoders force section-specific semantics
items.rationale: Likely contributes to normal/shuffled NLL overlap.

items.current_g1: A is trained with hidden z insertion and answer only
items.official_heima: A is trained in normal LM token space with visible thinking tokens
items.rationale: Current A does not learn a Heima-style compressed text trajectory.

items.official_heima: Official decoder losses are added directly in current_loss
items.rationale: Loss weighting differs from observed official summation.

items.official_heima: Official paths target large external checkpoints
items.rationale: Operational adaptation requested by user.

items.current_g1: Current preserves only joint no-detach latent-to-A idea and CE scaffolding
items.official_heima: Would preserve section tokens, local decoders, projector, question-conditioned decoder
items.rationale: Current G1 should be described as Heima-inspired probe, not a lightweight Heima baseline.
